form.formComment: At the latest run made ground from midfield; 2nd of 9 at Warrnambool Bm62 on March 26 over 1400m, slow going 5 len behind Ultra Blue carrying 58.5kg at $7.50. The start before that led to the turn then faded 5th of 10 at Pakenham Bm66 on February 19 over 1400m, 1.1 len behind Mount Sabyinyo carrying 60.5kg at $3.70. Going well. Can settle handy and take catching.

form.formComment: Gelding returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Previous preparation first-up won by 1.3 len Sale Bm64 July 31 over 1423m slow track defeating Battaglia carrying 58.5kg at $19. Expecting a strong run fresh.
